title: Nuage Oatmeal Daily Moisturizing Cream for All Skin Types with Soothing Oatmeal Extracts, Hydrating and Nourishing Formula, 600ml Pump Bottle

features: Enhanced Hydration: Formulated with oatmeal extracts to deeply hydrate and replenish skin, improving moisture balance and leaving it feeling soft and smooth.
Suitable for All Skin Types: Gentle and effective, this daily moisturizing cream is ideal for all skin types, including sensitive skin.
Quick Absorption: Absorbs rapidly without a greasy residue, making it perfect for daily use and easy to incorporate into your skincare routine.
Large 600ml Pump Bottle: Convenient and economical 600ml size with a user-friendly pump dispenser for easy application and long-lasting use.
Restores Natural Barrier: Enriched with nourishing ingredients to support and restore the skin’s natural protective barrier for healthier, more resilient skin.
Safety First: Free from harsh chemicals; formulated for external use only. Avoid contact with eyes, and discontinue use if irritation occurs. Keep out of reach of children.
description: Product Description Nuage Oatmeal Daily Moisturizing Cream for All Skin Types with Soothing Oatmeal Extracts, Hydrating and Nourishing Formula, 600ml Pump Bottle Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children to prevent accidental ingestion, For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes, In case of eye contact, rinse thoroughly with water, Discontinue use if irritation or allergic reaction occurs, Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight.
